verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, glorious victory That day He set me free, And made my heart His very throne. My life is no longer mine, I’m a prisoner of love divine, And now I live to praise His name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who I am, Lord, who I am, I can see now, who I am. A part of my saviour, A part of his word. It’s a revelation It's a predestination Of who I am.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: On Calvary He died To redeem His lost bride, The king of kings Became my saviour; This is God’s great mystery Of love expressed to me, That Christ and I Might be made one!
